authorization_model: NONE — no auth, no session, no CSRF, no before_request hook anywhere in studio/. Recorded decision (src/fanops/studio/CLAUDE.md: 'no auth by design — don't add CSRF/rate-limit tickets; declined as out-of-scope for localhost'). Boundary = the network interface: app.run(host=...) , cli.py:1285, default 127.0.0.1:8787.
csrf_model: EVERY mutating route is CSRF-exposed. Flask has no CSRF token; forms are plain htmx POSTs. Any page the operator visits can forge a POST to any of these while the Studio is running.
